form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 5.6m finishing third behind Laps Gede at Vincennes over 2700m in a 4yo colts and gelding race on October 14 at $15. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.7m at Vincennes beating Lucky Meslois in 4yo colts and gelding race on September 21 at $7.10. Should be right in the finish.
